ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "uid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier from external source */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime" (
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the anime */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genres associated with the anime */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes in the anime */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity metric for the anime */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the anime among other titles */,
  "studio" TEXT /* Production studio of the anime */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the anime */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Source material of the anime */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the anime series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the anime series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the anime */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the anime's trailer */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL of the anime's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to user's unique identifier */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to anime's unique identifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user added the anime to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to user who wrote the review */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime being reviewed */,
  "scores" TEXT /* Scores given by user in various categories */,
  "overall_score" INTEGER /* Overall score assigned by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_following" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the follower */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the followed user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user started following another user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "followed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime it belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number in the series */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime the notification is about */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime being analyzed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total view count for the anime */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Total like count for the anime */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total comment count for the anime */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the anime */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the comment */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime the comment is about */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime being rated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants email notifications */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants push notifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watching_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watching history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who watched the episode */,
  "anime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the anime being watched */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being watched */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the episode was watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watching_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watching_history_anime_id FOREIGN KEY ("anime_id") REFERENCES anime ("anime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watching_history_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
